title: Founding Growth Marketer
must_haves: Experience driving measurable growth at an early-stage ENTERPRISE B2B startup
Operate across full marketing stack (customer research, messaging, campaigns, analytics)
Strong bias for execution and ownership; zero-to-one mindset
Analytical thinking + creative storytelling; highly experimental
Leverage modern AI/automation tools to analyse, track, report, execute
met_strengths: Exact founding/first-marketer profile — built Minima's GTM, positioning and messaging from scratch
Measurable growth: 15x-ROI presale, 100k community, 30k blog visitors
AI-agent fluency (Claude Code) aligns tightly with agentic-AI procurement product
Bias-to-execution founding-era operator; London-based, UK auth
hard_blockers_note: Soft must-have gap: 'measurable growth at an early-stage ENTERPRISE B2B startup'. Ryan's growth is community-led/consumer crypto, not enterprise B2B procurement — adjacent, not direct. Partial on the one stated experience criterion.
one_line_verdict: Strong founding-marketer instincts and AI fluency, but the role specifically wants enterprise-B2B growth experience that Ryan lacks — capped at plausible rather than strong.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby posting API; full description pulled. Sequoia-backed; team ex-OpenAI/Meta/Revolut/NASA/McKinsey.
